dialogos.texto_en: Ah, Uesugi-san!\nGood timing!
What's up Yotsuba, you need something from me?
How about going swimming now?\nWe've come all the way to Okinawa,\nlet's enjoy the ocean!
...Didn't you just swim with Raiha\na little while ago?
I was just warming up!\nThe sea is beckoning me to come back!
That's a scary way to put it.
(It's nice of her to invite me,\n but I don't think I can keep up\n with Yotsuba's stamina.)
(When it comes to endurance,\n Yotsuba is in a league of her own...)
Thanks for the invite, but I'll pass.
Aww, Uesugi-san too?\nMiku also said she doesn't want to join me.
It's not that we hate swimming,\nit's just that we can't keep up with your stamina, Yotsuba.
Yeah, Miku's right.
Come on guys!\nTry to enjoy the ocean as long as we're in Okinawa.\nIt's such a waste not to.
You're on a different level, Yotsuba.\nItsuki was swimming with you earlier\nand she was exhausted.
Huh?
Did you overdo it again...?
B-but, I did slow down my pace\nsince Raiha-chan accompanied us.
I thought that Itsuki and Raiha-chan\nwere doing just fine...
Listen, you're like a dolphin and your stamina level is off the \ncharts. What's slow for you might be way too fast for others.
Ooohh, I'm sorry, I got carried away.\nBut the ocean was just too beautiful.
I understand why you got so excited swimming through the \nOkinawan ocean. We don't come here very often.
Indeed. I remember how excited you were\nwhen we first arrived in Okinawa, Futaro.
Oooh...
But, personally,\nI prefer admiring the beauty of the ocean\ninstead of swimming in it.
Just looking is a waste.\nWe came all the way to Okinawa, so let's swim!
Enjoy yourself. I'll be admiring the ocean.
But, is admiring the view really good enough?\nWe've come all the way to Okinawa,\nwe should at least swim a little.
Everyone has their own way of enjoying themselves.\nI don't want you to deny my way of having fun.
Ah, uh, it's also nice to just admire the ocean!\nThe view from here is as beautiful as a painting!
So there are various ways to enjoy the ocean, huh.
You bet!
Well, we're here until the sun goes down. Which means\nwe have plenty of time to enjoy the ocean.
In that case, I'll go swimming now!
Just don't overdo it.\nYou're the type to end up\nin the no-swim zone before you know it.
How about doing both activities together?\nWe can swim to our heart's content, and afterwards relax\non the floater and gaze out at the sea.
Good idea!
But, I'm not sure I can keep up with you, Yotsuba.
Don't worry, I won't swim too fast!\nI'll pace myself.
But, Itsuki got annihilated.
I-I'll behave myself better this time!
Well, we're here until the sun goes down. Which means\nwe have plenty of time to enjoy the ocean.
In that case, I'll go swimming now!
Just don't overdo it.\nYou're the type to end up\nin the no-swim zone before you know it.
There are several ways to enjoy the ocean.\nSwimming and gazing out at the sea\nboth have their merits.
I appreciate that they provided us with\nthe floater earlier. It was so relaxing.
I don't really feel like doing anything too strenuous.\nRight now relaxing on the floater sounds good to me.
Oh, it did look very relaxing.\nIf we get tired of swimming,\nwe should try to rest on the floater.
Yeah, it was really enjoyable. I guess you could say\nthat you become one with nature...\nIt's an experience worth having.
People have their own ways of getting close to nature,\ndon't they.
That's diversity, right?
Do you know what you're talking about?
You can have different perspectives on the same subject, right?
Well, actually, it means\nthat there are many things that are similar in nature,\nbut have a wide range.
Nah, it's okay.\nIt's not really necessary to explain it here, is it?
Well, we're here until the sun goes down. Which means\nwe have plenty of time to enjoy the ocean.
In that case, I'll go swimming now!
Just don't overdo it.\nYou're the type to end up\nin the no-swim zone before you know it.
Ahaha, c'mon, I wouldn't do that.
If you change your mind, let me know.\nLet's go swimming!
Come to think of it,\nyou aren't here with Nino, huh?
W-well, I guess.
Futaro, you should focus a little more on Nino...
Huh? What do you mean?
Uh, nothing. Nevermind.
Huh?
Cause we're rivals, me and Nino.
